# 2026-01-14 — Wednesday

Feverish yesterday; better today. Took it slow.

Rolled back the xcodebuild change. The perf gain wasn't worth the flakiness.

Priya pushed the numpy bump. Broke one test. Fixed it without regret — the test was wrong.

Priya pushed the httpx bump. Broke one test. Fixed it without regret — the test was wrong.

Pushed the fix. Ran the dataset doctor twice to be sure.
